ItacPersonItem.PersonalTitle: Marquis of Poggio Gregorio|Knight of the Order of the Star
ItacPersonItem.Notes: Founder of the Fucina Academy in Messina. For a short biographical account see Antonino Mongitore, Bibliotheca Sicula, Didaci Bua, Palermo, Vol.I, pp. 125-126 (BL Shelfmark:610.m.10.)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
